rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious PowerShell Cmdlets

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious PowerShell Cmdlets
id: 33a86fea-add2-42b3-bccb-96285c619933
status: experimental
description: "Many of our PowerShell detection analytics look for cmdlets, methods,\
  \ and \nswitches that may indicate malicious activity. The following analytic is\
  \ \nby no means exhaustive but offers a few valuable examples of suspicious \ncmdlets\
  \ and other oft-abused features to look out for. Part of the \nRedCanary 2024 Threat\
  \ Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/powershell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - -nop
    - -noni
    - -invoke-expression
    - iex
    - .downloadstring
    - downloadfile
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
